falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below 4000 (key support level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a breakdown in the pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a bearish trend rather than a consolidation phase.
A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting an imminent reversal or crash.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index closes above 30 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained elevated volatility would indicate market panic, falsifying the HOLD verdict by showing a clear shift toward a bear market scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
